title: calamintha glabella
intro: Calamintha glabella, also known as Sweet Calamint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is prized for its unique flavor and aroma. The medicinal properties of Calamintha glabella include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Calamintha glabella can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to reap its health benefits, which include soothing stomach upset, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting a restful sleep.
